Class SchemaPerTenantStrategy

Isolation strategy: all tenants share one database but each gets a dedicated schema (e.g., acme.Products, globex.Products). Good balance of isolation vs cost.

The schema is taken from Schema. If not set, falls back to Id.

Syntax
public static class SchemaPerTenantStrategy

Methods

| Edit this page View Source

Apply(ModelBuilder, ITenantContext)

Applies the current tenant's schema as the EF Core default schema. Call from OnModelCreating:

protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder builder)
{
    SchemaPerTenantStrategy.Apply(builder, _tenantContext);
    base.OnModelCreating(builder);
}
Declaration
public static void Apply(ModelBuilder modelBuilder, ITenantContext tenantContext)
Parameters
Type Name Description
ModelBuilder modelBuilder
ITenantContext tenantContext
